_comment: Example user preferences file. Copy to .brains_in_a_hat/user-preferences.json and customize. Meta Agent also learns and updates this file over time.
_safety: This file should NEVER contain passwords, tokens, API keys, or information that could be harmful if leaked. Meta Agent will refuse to store sensitive data.

threading.note: Use Qt threading primitives in Qt apps, not Python threading.Thread

professional_context._comment: Meta Agent learns and updates this section. Helps with proactive suggestions like paper opportunities, deadline reminders, and attribution.

proactive_suggestions._note: Meta Agent will suggest when work could become a paper, remind about deadlines, ensure proper attribution, and flag novel contributions.
